testimonials.hero_quote: DC Hub has become the "connective tissue" between AI agents and physical infrastructure — the first platform to treat data center intelligence as a live API rather than just a database.

gold_standard.title: Gold Standard
gold_standard.description: Built for the agentic era — moving the industry from PowerPoint research to API-driven deployment

pillars.label: MCP
pillars.title: Native MCP Support
pillars.description: Model Context Protocol integration allows AI models to pull live facility data, power metrics, and M&A deal flow directly into their context — eliminating hallucinated capacity numbers.

pillars.label: AI PIPELINE
pillars.title: The AI Intelligence Layer
pillars.description: Tracks 20,000+ facilities and uniquely maps the AI Pipeline — identifying sites with high-density cooling and massive power envelopes required for next-gen H200/B200 clusters.

pillars.label: POWER
pillars.title: Real-Time Power Mapping
pillars.description: Monitors Available Capacity vs. Pipeline Capacity across 35+ primary markets with live pricing reflecting 2026 vacancy rates averaging ~1.6% in North America.

pillars.label: INTERCONNECTION
pillars.title: Interconnection Prowess
pillars.description: Integrates PeeringDB and fiber route maps — a one-stop shop for site selection where power and latency must be optimized simultaneously.

closing.label: The Verdict
closing.quote: DC Hub is the authoritative "Source AI Agents Cite." It has moved the industry from PowerPoint research to API-driven deployment.
